languages.text: "Позволю заметить, что отсутствие речи у сервиторов является скорее недостатком, чем плюсом. Однако же, если Вольный Торговец распорядится, при сервиторизации я вполне могу оставить ее голосовые связки интактными или даже внести в них некоторые усовершенствования".

"I will readily admit that the lack of speech in servitors is more of a disadvantage than a plus. However, if the Rogue Trader so bids, I can certainly leave her vocal cords intact or even make some improvements to them during the servitorisation process."
languages.original_text: "Позволю заметить, что отсутствие речи у сервиторов является скорее недостатком, чем плюсом. Однако же, если Вольный Торговец распорядится, при сервиторизации я вполне могу оставить ее голосовые связки интактными или даже внести в них некоторые усовершенствования".

traits.locale_text: "I will readily admit that the lack of speech in servitors is more of a disadvantage than a plus. However, if the Rogue Trader so bids, I can certainly leave her vocal cords intact or even make some improvements to them during the servitorisation process."

"I will readily admit that the lack of speech in servitors is more of a disadvantage than a plus. However, if the Rogue Trader so bids, I can certainly leave her vocal cords intact or even make some improvements to them during the servitorisation process."

"I will readily admit that the lack of speech in servitors is more of a disadvantage than a plus. However, if the Rogue Trader so bids, I can certainly leave her vocal cords intact or even make some improvements to them during the servitorisation process."

languages.text: «Seré el primero en admitir que la falta de habla en los servidores es más un obstáculo que una ayuda. Sin embargo, Comerciante Independiente, si lo desea puedo dejar intactas sus cuerdas vocales e incluso mejorarlas durante el proceso de servidorización».
languages.original_text: "I will readily admit that the lack of speech in servitors is more of a disadvantage than a plus. However, if the Rogue Trader so bids, I can certainly leave her vocal cords intact or even make some improvements to them during the servitorisation process."

traits.locale_text: «Seré el primero en admitir que la falta de habla en los servidores es más un obstáculo que una ayuda. Sin embargo, Comerciante Independiente, si lo desea puedo dejar intactas sus cuerdas vocales e incluso mejorarlas durante el proceso de servidorización».

languages.text: “我很乐意承认，机仆不会说话确实弊大于利。不过，如果行商浪人有此要求，我完全可以在机仆化过程中保留她的声带，甚至再做一些改进。”
languages.original_text: "I will readily admit that the lack of speech in servitors is more of a disadvantage than a plus. However, if the Rogue Trader so bids, I can certainly leave her vocal cords intact or even make some improvements to them during the servitorisation process."

traits.locale_text: “我很乐意承认，机仆不会说话确实弊大于利。不过，如果行商浪人有此要求，我完全可以在机仆化过程中保留她的声带，甚至再做一些改进。”

languages.text: « Je reconnais que l'incapacité des servitors à parler est plutôt un désavantage. Cependant, si {mf|le libre-marchand|la libre-marchande} me le demande, je peux conserver ses cordes vocales, voire les améliorer pendant le processus de servitorisation. »
languages.original_text: "I will readily admit that the lack of speech in servitors is more of a disadvantage than a plus. However, if the Rogue Trader so bids, I can certainly leave her vocal cords intact or even make some improvements to them during the servitorisation process."

traits.locale_text: « Je reconnais que l'incapacité des servitors à parler est plutôt un désavantage. Cependant, si {mf|le libre-marchand|la libre-marchande} me le demande, je peux conserver ses cordes vocales, voire les améliorer pendant le processus de servitorisation. »

languages.text: "Hizmetörlerde konuşma yetisinin olmamasının avantajdan ziyade dezavantaj olduğunu kolaylıkla kabul ediyorum. Ancak Hür Tacir emrederse ses tellerini sağlam bırakabilir ve hatta hizmetörleştirilme sürecinde onlarda birtakım iyileştirmeler yapabilirim."
languages.original_text: "I will readily admit that the lack of speech in servitors is more of a disadvantage than a plus. However, if the Rogue Trader so bids, I can certainly leave her vocal cords intact or even make some improvements to them during the servitorisation process."

traits.locale_text: "Hizmetörlerde konuşma yetisinin olmamasının avantajdan ziyade dezavantaj olduğunu kolaylıkla kabul ediyorum. Ancak Hür Tacir emrederse ses tellerini sağlam bırakabilir ve hatta hizmetörleştirilme sürecinde onlarda birtakım iyileştirmeler yapabilirim."

languages.text: 「サーヴィターに発話能力がないことは、利点というよりむしろ難点であると、私は進んで認めます。しかしながら、ローグトレーダーがそうお望みであれば、サーヴィター化の過程で、彼女の声帯を無傷のまま残すことも、あるいは多少の改良を加えることさえ、確かに可能です」
languages.original_text: "I will readily admit that the lack of speech in servitors is more of a disadvantage than a plus. However, if the Rogue Trader so bids, I can certainly leave her vocal cords intact or even make some improvements to them during the servitorisation process."

traits.locale_text: 「サーヴィターに発話能力がないことは、利点というよりむしろ難点であると、私は進んで認めます。しかしながら、ローグトレーダーがそうお望みであれば、サーヴィター化の過程で、彼女の声帯を無傷のまま残すことも、あるいは多少の改良を加えることさえ、確かに可能です」

languages.text: "Ich gebe zu, das fehlende Sprachvermögen von Servitoren ist eher ein Nachteil als ein Pluspunkt. Wenn es {mf|der Freihändler|die Freihändlerin} wünscht, kann ich ihre Stimmbänder im Rahmen der Servitorisierung aber erhalten oder vielleicht sogar einige Verbesserungen vornehmen."
languages.original_text: "I will readily admit that the lack of speech in servitors is more of a disadvantage than a plus. However, if the Rogue Trader so bids, I can certainly leave her vocal cords intact or even make some improvements to them during the servitorisation process."

traits.locale_text: "Ich gebe zu, das fehlende Sprachvermögen von Servitoren ist eher ein Nachteil als ein Pluspunkt. Wenn es {mf|der Freihändler|die Freihändlerin} wünscht, kann ich ihre Stimmbänder im Rahmen der Servitorisierung aber erhalten oder vielleicht sogar einige Verbesserungen vornehmen."
